name: Nova Menu
description: An extensible Geometry Dash utility menu with HUD tools, practice helpers, profiles, and a safe practice-only macro recorder.

show-main-menu-button.name: Show main-menu button
show-main-menu-button.description: Adds a Nova Menu button to the Geometry Dash main menu.

show-pause-button.name: Show pause-menu button
show-pause-button.description: Adds a Nova Menu button to the pause screen.

enable-f2-keybind.name: Enable F2 keybind
enable-f2-keybind.description: Press F2 to open Nova Menu on desktop platforms.
